visuals.title: System Programs Categories
visuals.description: Diagram showing the seven categories of system programs and their relationship to the kernel and applications

diagrams.title: System Programs in the OS Hierarchy
steps: Users interact with system programs (ls, gcc, vim, ssh)
System programs internally invoke system calls
System calls interface with the kernel
Results flow back up to the user
diagrams.notes: System programs sit between application programs and the kernel. They define most of the user's view of the operating system.
